3053585.title: SpongeBob
3053585.description: SpongeBob SquarePants is een gele zeespons die diep in de oceaan leeft in het onderwaterstadje Bikinibroek. Samen met zijn maatje Patrick de roze zeester beleeft SpongeBob de gekste en spannendste avonturen.

3053673.title: Regenboog Vlinder Eenhoorn Kitten
3053673.description: Yana eats a witch's apple and instantly falls asleep so Felicity and Miguel have to find a way to break the spell. // Felicity is having fun at her party, she convinces the Sand Crab Man to take the night off, which causes chaos in Mythlandia.

3053735.title: Regenboog Vlinder Eenhoorn Kitten
3053735.description: Felicity can't decide what to do for the Mythlandia Talent Contest while Miguel channels his guitar skills. // Felicity creates a rainbow, causing a leprechaun named Paddy to appear.

3053796.title: Dorg van Dango
3053796.description: Dorgs bril gaat steeds stuk en hij wil een nieuwe, maar van z'n moeder moet hij bewijzen dat hij zuinig kan zijn op z'n huidige bril. // Er blijken spullen te worden gestolen uit het winkelcentrum. Dorg en z'n vrienden gaan op onderzoek uit.

3054496.title: Les pingouins de Madagascar
3054496.description: King Julien's archrival, Clemson, returns in another attempt to claim the lemur crown. // Private's favorite treat, the Peanut Butter Winky, is going the way of the dinosaur.

3054552.title: Les pingouins de Madagascar
3054552.description: Kowalski invents an enemy detector but it doesn't work. Old enemies are now friends & old friends are now enemies. // The annual Zoo Snooze is here! This year the Vesuvius Twins buy up all the tickets. The zoosters plan to exact revenge on the twins.

3054614.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
3054614.description: After witnessing the Kraang in action, Karai realizes the seriousness of the alien threat and approaches the Turtles to propose an alliance.

3054660.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
3054660.description: While the Turtles are infiltrating an undersea Kraang base, the Foot Clan attempts to capture April, forcing her to fend for herself in a battle of wits against Karai.

3054731.title: Fairly Odd Parents
3054731.description: Timmy likes a new girl at school. He wishes he was 'emo' and stops caring about everything. // Timmy and the fairies have to rid his home of fairy dust. The basement comes alive. Mom and Dad go to a fake spa.

3055460.title: Fairly Odd Parents
3055460.description: Timmy wishes Mr. Crocker would disappear. Crocker becomes invisible. Dad thinks the house is haunted.

3055500.title: Alvin en de Chipmunks
3055500.description: When Theodore thinks he's a real superhero, Alvin and Simon have a tough time convincing him to leave the crime fighting to the professionals.

3055528.title: Alvin en de Chipmunks
3055528.description: Brittany is humiliated by Jeanette's lack of style. That is, until Jeanette is proclaimed a fashion trendsetter by Brittany's style icon. Now Brittany wants to prove she's more stylish than her sister.

3055567.title: SpongeBob
3055567.description: SpongeBob is een vierkante, gele zeespons die in een grote ananas op de bodem van de oceaan woont. In de plaats Bikinibroek heeft hij het gezelschap van vrienden en van zijn huisdier, Gerrit de slak.

3055595.title: SpongeBob
3055595.description: SpongeBob SquarePants is een gele zeespons die diep in de oceaan leeft in het onderwaterstadje Bikinibroek. Samen met zijn maatje Patrick de roze zeester beleeft SpongeBob de gekste en spannendste avonturen.

3055654.title: SpongeBob
3055654.description: SpongeBob SquarePants is een gele zeespons die diep in de oceaan leeft in het onderwaterstadje Bikinibroek. Samen met zijn maatje Patrick de roze zeester beleeft SpongeBob de gekste en spannendste avonturen.

3056202.title: SpongeBob
3056202.description: SpongeBob SquarePants is een gele zeespons die diep in de oceaan leeft in het onderwaterstadje Bikinibroek. Samen met zijn maatje Patrick de roze zeester beleeft SpongeBob de gekste en spannendste avonturen.

3056265.title: SpongeBob
3056265.description: SpongeBob SquarePants is een gele zeespons die diep in de oceaan leeft in het onderwaterstadje Bikinibroek. Samen met zijn maatje Patrick de roze zeester beleeft SpongeBob de gekste en spannendste avonturen.

3056319.title: SpongeBob
3056319.description: SpongeBob is een vierkante, gele zeespons die in een grote ananas op de bodem van de oceaan woont. In de plaats Bikinibroek heeft hij het gezelschap van vrienden en van zijn huisdier, Gerrit de slak.

3056422.title: Alvin en de Chipmunks
3056422.description: Theodore's new talking-teddy bear is driving Alvin and Simon nuts. So, they decide to rewire the bear's hard drive, so the bear will follow their directions! But when Alvin abuses the privilege, Simon turns the tables on him.

3056435.title: Alvin en de Chipmunks
3056435.description: Just like every year, Alvin is none-too thrilled about going back to school. That is until he sees the new Principal and then it's whoa! Love at first sight!

3057138.title: Alvin en de Chipmunks
3057138.description: When Theodore disappears from his bed, leaving a blob of sticky, green slime behind, Alvin is POSITIVE that he has been kidnapped by aliens!With the help of Simon and his home-made high-tech gear, they are ready to fight the aliens and save their brother.

3057189.title: Les pingouins de Madagascar
3057189.description: A Delaware Blue Hen has taken up residence at the zoo, and she has the amazing ability to predict the future! // The penguins need a thumb, and Maurice's fits the bill nicely.

3057280.title: Les pingouins de Madagascar
3057280.description: The penguins discover the abuse that Randy the sheep gets in the children's zoo from all the children tugging at his wool, and decide to find him a new home. // The duckling Eggy is back. The training that the penguins gave him worked.

3057327.title: Huize Herrie
3057327.description: When Lincoln wants to watch the finale of his favorite show, he has to beat each sister to get to the couch first! // After Lincoln leaves a scathing voicemail on Lori's phone, he realizes he has to erase it before Lori hears it.

3058096.title: The Loud House
3058096.description: Lincoln is tired of his sisters meddling in his business until he's being picked on at school. // Lincoln secretly videos his sister's most embarrassing moments in order to win a video contest at school.

3058178.title: De Casagrandes
3058178.description: When Bobby finds out Carl can't swim, he offers to show him the ways of the waves! // After begging Abuelo for some A/C, the cousins decide to earn some cash at the neighborhood fair.

3058230.title: De Casagrandes
3058230.description: The Changs go on vacation and leave Ronnie Anne and her cousins to watch after Cam, the chameleon snake. // Ronnie Anne and her skate buddies work together to show their coach that they have what it takes to make a team.

3059022.title: SpongeBob
3059022.description: SpongeBob SquarePants is een gele zeespons die diep in de oceaan leeft in het onderwaterstadje Bikinibroek. Samen met zijn maatje Patrick de roze zeester beleeft SpongeBob de gekste en spannendste avonturen.

3059104.title: SpongeBob
3059104.description: SpongeBob is een vierkante, gele zeespons die in een grote ananas op de bodem van de oceaan woont. In de plaats Bikinibroek heeft hij het gezelschap van vrienden en van zijn huisdier, Gerrit de slak.

3059133.title: SpongeBob
3059133.description: SpongeBob SquarePants is een gele zeespons die diep in de oceaan leeft in het onderwaterstadje Bikinibroek. Samen met zijn maatje Patrick de roze zeester beleeft SpongeBob de gekste en spannendste avonturen.

3059202.title: De avonturen van Kid Danger
3059202.description: While stuck in a restaurant bathroom, Ray, Henry, Charlotte, Jasper, and Schwoz reminisce about past adventures.

3059262.title: Dorg van Dango
3059262.description: Yooki is caught in one of Mr. Munch's ghost traps, Dorg and the gang must rescue her before she's revealed on TV and sent back to Area 52! // A video game from RD's planet infects every machine in Normill, Dorg and the gang must stop the chaos!

3060002.title: Sanjay & Craig
3060002.description: Sanjay and Craig try to reunite former rap duo Street Dogg and Tufflips, but their failed efforts only lead to a town divided - and the mother of all rap battles!

3060068.title: Sanjay & Craig
3060068.description: Sanjay and Craig are suspicious of the family's new high-tech car that anticipates their every whim. // A love-smitten Craig kidnaps an electric eel from the tank of a sushi restaurant.

3060146.title: Pinguïns van Madagascar
3060146.description: When Skipper is knocked on the head, he's unable to lead the penguins on an important mission. / Private accidentally drinks Kowalski's truth serum and starts spilling the penguin's secrets to the rest of the zoo.

3060864.title: Pinguïns van Madagascar
3060864.description: During a solar eclipse, Phil and Mason convince the bossy Julien that the sky spirits are angry at him. He starts acting extra-nice.

3060892.title: Fairly Odd Parents
3060892.description: Foop is back! This time, he's seeking to be the most popular kid at magic school. His plan? Running for class president against Poof. // Dad changes Timmy's room into a surveillance center to prove that his kindly neighbor, Dinkleberg, is truly evil.

3060972.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
3060972.description: The team must overcome impossible odds to acquire the final Black Hole Generator piece.

3061032.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
3061032.description: When April graduates to full Kunoichi, she faces a deadly new enemy, while the Turtles face the return of some old, dangerous foes...

3061083.title: Ollie's Pack
3061083.description: After a series of locker vandalism, Ollie becomes hall monitor and summons a sheriff monster from the pack. // While Ollie is out of commission with a swollen ankle, Pyper takes on the job of Chosen One.

3061884.title: SpongeBob
3061884.description: SpongeBob SquarePants is een gele zeespons die diep in de oceaan leeft in het onderwaterstadje Bikinibroek. Samen met zijn maatje Patrick de roze zeester beleeft SpongeBob de gekste en spannendste avonturen.

3061937.title: Kung Fu Panda - Legends of Awesomeness
3061937.description: When Taotie tries to destroy the Jade Palace and fails, he is sent to prison while his son, Bian Zao, is left behind with Po, who acts like a big brother to the boy who thinks everything is lame!

3062030.title: Kung Fu Panda - Legends of Awesomeness
3062030.description: While repairs are being made to the noodle shop, Mr. Ping turns the training hall into a restaurant!

3062814.title: Alvin en de Chipmunks
3062814.description: When Theodore disappears from his bed, leaving a blob of sticky, green slime behind, Alvin is POSITIVE that he has been kidnapped by aliens!With the help of Simon and his home-made high-tech gear, they are ready to fight the aliens and save their brother.

3062865.title: Alvin en de Chipmunks
3062865.description: It's Jeanette's birthday but she doesn't want to celebrate it, since she no longer believes in the magic of this special day. So the Chipmunks and Chipettes join forces in order to offer her a magical, fairy-tale birthday she will ever forget.

3062877.title: Alvin en de Chipmunks
3062877.description: Following a fight with Brittany, Eleanor decides to move in with Alvin and his brothers! Alvin panics! Their 'bro zone' has been invaded!

3062904.title: SpongeBob
3062904.description: SpongeBob is een vierkante, gele zeespons die in een grote ananas op de bodem van de oceaan woont. In de plaats Bikinibroek heeft hij het gezelschap van vrienden en van zijn huisdier, Gerrit de slak.

3062984.title: SpongeBob
3062984.description: SpongeBob is een vierkante, gele zeespons die in een grote ananas op de bodem van de oceaan woont. In de plaats Bikinibroek heeft hij het gezelschap van vrienden en van zijn huisdier, Gerrit de slak.

3063741.title: De Casagrandes
3063741.description: Adelaide and Carl have an adventure on Mr. Chang's route, but can they work together to save the day? // When Mama Lupe comes to visit, Abuela tries to get her family at the top of their cultural game.

3063836.title: The Loud House
3063836.description: Lincoln signs his family up for a talent show and they form a band. // It's Dad's annual Take Your Daughter to Work Day so Mom offers to take Lincoln to her work: a dental office.

3063888.title: The Loud House
3063888.description: When a high utility bill threatens Hector and Rosa's annual trip, Ronnie Anne spearheads an effort to lower usage.

3063938.title: Hier is Pony
3063938.description: When Annie tries to stop Pony from being nosy, she creates a bigger problem that puts him in danger! // When Annie takes pity on a lonely friend and lets her spend the day with Pony, she worries her friend is better at taking care of Pony.

3064698.title: Alvin en de Chipmunks
3064698.description: When his brothers won't listen to Theodore's song, he posts a video of himself rapping on the Internet and it becomes a mega-hit! Soon Theodore, (now Lil T), is offered a solo career and has to decide between family and fame as a solo artist.

3064728.title: SpongeBob
3064728.description: SpongeBob is een vierkante, gele zeespons die in een grote ananas op de bodem van de oceaan woont. In de plaats Bikinibroek heeft hij het gezelschap van vrienden en van zijn huisdier, Gerrit de slak.

3064799.title: SpongeBob
3064799.description: SpongeBob is een vierkante, gele zeespons die in een grote ananas op de bodem van de oceaan woont. In de plaats Bikinibroek heeft hij het gezelschap van vrienden en van zijn huisdier, Gerrit de slak.

3064885.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
3064885.description: The Turtles meet their first fanboy when a teenage wannabe hero decides to fight crime and dress up as "The Pulverizer."

3065696.title: The Loud House
3065696.description: The family embarks on a reading challenge at the library but Lola refuses to participate. // When Lincoln discovers the first page of his baby book is blank, he worries his parents are hiding something.

3065765.title: The Loud House
3065765.description: To get Lily to stop crying the kids give her an old singing toy from the attic but it quickly drives them crazy. // Dad declares war on the kids' devices so they decide to show Dad how great electronics and the internet are.

3065851.title: De Casagrandes
3065851.description: Ronnie Anne and her primos try to win Maria a trip around the world. // When Carlota fails at hair cutting, she trains with the master barber himself - CJ!

3066666.title: SpongeBob
3066666.description: SpongeBob SquarePants is een gele zeespons die diep in de oceaan leeft in het onderwaterstadje Bikinibroek. Samen met zijn maatje Patrick de roze zeester beleeft SpongeBob de gekste en spannendste avonturen.

3066745.title: SpongeBob
3066745.description: SpongeBob SquarePants is een gele zeespons die diep in de oceaan leeft in het onderwaterstadje Bikinibroek. Samen met zijn maatje Patrick de roze zeester beleeft SpongeBob de gekste en spannendste avonturen.

3066837.title: Avatar
3066837.description: A powerful storm brings up painful memories of the past - and puts everyone in jeopardy in the present.

3067644.title: Avatar
3067644.description: After Sokka and Katara get sick due to being in the storm, Aang seeks out a cure and discovers he needs some frozen frogs in order to get them cured.

3067720.title: Fairly Odd Parents
3067720.description: Poof finally becomes a fairy godparent. Unfortunately, it's to Mrs. Crocker.

3067787.title: Fairly Odd Parents
3067787.description: Timmy and Chloe find out they have the same birthday and compete for the best party.

3067813.title: Kung Fu Panda : l'incroyable légende
3067813.description: Po and Mantis visit the equivalent of an ancient Chinese Comic-Con, where Po's fanboy enthusiasm gets out of hand.

3068617.title: Ollie's Pack
3068617.description: After Bev and Andre split up as bounty hunting partners, Ollie decides to help Andre get back on his feet. // Ollie gets a computer monster, CAGE, to write an essay for him, but the essay is too good, and the monster too evil.

3068669.title: Alvin en de Chipmunks
3068669.description: Theodore is desperate to land the part of the monster in a play, so Alvin decides to show Theodore how to really scare people. But Alvin scares him so badly, that poor Theodore freezes like a statue. Can Alvin unfreeze Theodore before the big audition?

3068711.title: Alvin en de Chipmunks
3068711.description: When an accident forces Simon to wear his embarrassing old glasses, he becomes the target of the school bully. Unwilling to remain a victim, Simon builds a homemade robot body-guard, that helps Simon stand up to the bullies.

3068730.title: Huize Herrie
3068730.description: After spilling an experiment of Lisa's, Lincoln sets off a chain reaction that unravels the household. // In an effort to be more energy-efficient Lincoln rallies his family to stop using so much electricity.

3068802.title: De Casagrandes
3068802.description: Ronnie Anne is determined to help CJ get onstage at a Pirate Dinner Show. // Ronnie and Sid have to decide whether they "borrow" money from a lost coin purse they found in the mercado.

3069609.title: SpongeBob
3069609.description: SpongeBob SquarePants is een gele zeespons die diep in de oceaan leeft in het onderwaterstadje Bikinibroek. Samen met zijn maatje Patrick de roze zeester beleeft SpongeBob de gekste en spannendste avonturen.
